nasb.text: God looked on the earth, and behold, it was corrupt; for all flesh had corrupted their way upon the earth.

esv.text: And God saw the earth, and behold, it was corrupt, for all flesh had corrupted their way on the earth.

cnv.text: 神觀看大地，看見世界已經敗壞了；全人類在地上所行的都是敗壞的。

ccb.text: 上帝看见世界败坏了，因为世人行为败坏。

csbs.text: 神观看大地，看哪，它已经败坏了，因为一切血肉之躯在地上的行为都败坏了！
